subcodes.first_line: O flower of the meadow of love! Light the lamp of the Covenant in the glass of thy heart, and illumine thereby the niche of creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای گل چمنستان محبت شمع میثاق در زجاجه فواد برافروز و مشکاه امکان را روشن نما
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @firmness in the Covenant, @call to action, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
